products.name: Air Bubble Film
products.description: Bubble Film, also called Air Bubble Film, Bubble Wrap, LDPE Air Bubble Film and so on. It is made of PE, the diameter of our Bubble is 10mm, 20mm, 25mm. The max width can be up to 2000 mm. Besides we can make the Bubble of 2 layer Bubble Film, 3 layers Bubble Film, 5 layers Bubble Film and other multilayer Bubble Film.

products.name: 2 Layer Bubble Bags
products.description: 2-layer bubble bags offer superior protection for delicate items by combining two layers of material. The outer layer is designed to be durable and resistant to punctures and abrasions, while the inner layer features air-filled bubbles that provide cushioning against shocks and impacts. This dual-layer construction ensures that fragile products, such as electronics and glassware, are well-protected during shipping or storage, reducing the risk of damage and enhancing overall safety.
applications: Fragile products during shipping and storage

products.name: 3 Layer Bubble Bags
products.description: 3-layer bubble bags provide exceptional protection for fragile items by incorporating an additional layer of cushioning compared to standard bubble bags. The outermost layer is crafted from a strong, puncture-resistant material that shields against external damage. Beneath this, a middle layer of air-filled bubbles offers superior shock absorption, cushioning the contents from impacts and vibrations. The innermost layer ensures an extra barrier of protection, preventing any potential scratches or abrasions.

specifications.innerLayer: Extra barrier against scratches and abrasions

applications: Valuable items during shipping and handling

products.name: Bubble With Woven Sack Laminated Bags & Sheet
products.description: Laminated bags combining bubble wrap with woven sack material for enhanced durability and protection.

products.name: Bubble With PE Foam Laminated Bags
products.description: Bubble with PE foam laminated bags are designed to offer superior protection and cushioning for delicate items. These bags integrate the soft, air-filled bubbles of traditional bubble wrap with a layer of polyethylene (PE) foam, which provides additional shock absorption and insulation. The PE foam layer enhances the cushioning effect, reducing the risk of damage from impacts and vibrations during shipping or storage. The laminated construction ensures that the bags are both durable and resilient.

products.name: Bubble With Aluminium Film Laminated Bags & Sheet
products.description: Bubble with aluminum film laminated bags and sheets offer a robust solution for protecting sensitive items from both physical damage and environmental factors. These products combine the cushioning properties of bubble wrap with a layer of aluminum film, which provides superior resistance to moisture, heat, and light. The aluminum film acts as a barrier against external elements, while the bubble layer absorbs shocks and impacts.

products.name: Antistatic Bubble Bags
products.description: Antistatic bubble bags are specialized packaging solutions designed to protect sensitive electronic components and devices from static electricity. These bags feature a layer of air-filled bubbles, which provide cushioning against impacts and shocks, combined with an antistatic material that prevents the buildup and discharge of static electricity. The antistatic properties help safeguard electronic parts from electrostatic discharge (ESD).

products.name: Bubble With Kraft Paper Laminated Sheet
products.description: Bubble with kraft paper laminated sheets offer a versatile and protective packaging solution by combining the cushioning benefits of bubble wrap with the strength and durability of kraft paper. The kraft paper layer provides an added layer of toughness, enhancing resistance to tearing and abrasion, while the bubble wrap layer absorbs shocks and impacts.

products.name: 3D Bubble Bags
products.description: 3D bubble bags feature a unique design that enhances protection for delicate items by incorporating three-dimensional bubble cushioning. Unlike traditional flat bubble wrap, these bags have a structured, three-dimensional bubble pattern that creates a more effective barrier against impacts and vibrations. The additional depth and coverage provided by the 3D bubbles offer superior shock absorption and cushioning.

products.name: EPE Sheet & Sheet Application
products.description: EPE (Expanded Polyethylene) sheets are versatile and lightweight materials used in a variety of applications due to their excellent cushioning, insulation, and impact resistance properties. Made from expanded polyethylene foam, these sheets offer superior shock absorption, thermal insulation, and resistance to moisture and chemicals.
applications: Packaging to protect fragile items during shipping
Automotive and industrial applications for noise and vibration reduction

products.name: EPE Sheet Rolls & Sheet Applications
products.description: EPE Sheet Rolls And Sheet Application provides versatile packaging and cushioning solutions across multiple industries.
applications: Packaging solutions: Dust covers, bubble wrap, corner pads, support pads, PE packaging buffers, encapsulation blocks, display usage etc.
Packaging of consumer durables and white goods like TV covers, Refrigerator packaging, LCD/LED packaging etc.
Packing material for painted surface of components
Automobiles: Carpet underlays, gaskets, seat cushion inserts, door liners, side / roof panels etc.

Transit packing of vehicles, returnable/multiple use packing material, domestic and exports spares packing, component packing, packing material for 2-wheelers steering wheel covers, windshield covers, die-punch wheel arch pads etc.

products.name: EPE Foam Tube
products.description: EPE Foam Tubes are manufactured using advanced machines following all the quality norms set by the industry. Extensively being used for thermal insulation in refrigeration and AC industries, our products are high in demand for their reliable performance, low water absorption and vapor permeability and it protects & degreases piping systems of AC.
applications: Thermal insulation in refrigeration and AC industries

products.name: EPE Foam Rod
products.description: EPE Foam Rods are versatile, lightweight components made from expanded polyethylene foam, designed to offer excellent cushioning, insulation, and impact resistance. Their flexible yet durable nature allows them to be easily cut and shaped for custom applications.
applications: Packaging to protect delicate items from shock and vibration during transit
Construction and manufacturing for insulation and noise reduction
Sealing gaps, padding edges, creating protective barriers
Spacers and supports in industrial and automotive applications

products.name: EPE Polyethylene Foam
products.description: EPE Foam has proved to be a superior insulating material because of its extremely low thermal conductivity and moisture absorbent properties. Without affecting its properties, EPE Foam can be used in temperature ranging from -40 degree to 70 degree.

properties: Chemical Resistant: Inert to most corrosive chemicals such as acids, alkalies and other chemical solvents

products.name: PU Foam Sheet
products.description: As a pioneer in foam conversion industry, our product range covers self-adhesive/non-adhesive foam parts, fabric laminated foam parts, aluminium laminated foam parts, seals & Gaskets, Thermoformed Components, PU moulded foam components, Heat shields / Thermal Jackets, Over Moulding Plastic components, Fabric Insert Moulded Parts, Foam Parts, Felt Parts, Foam Tapes, Door Trims, and many more.
applications: Self Adhesive Non Adhesive Foam Parts

products.name: Crosslinked Foam
products.description: Crosslinked foam are excellent product of closed cell structure, which fulfills our customer's packaging, transporting and marketing objectives in cost effective way. They ensure the protection of your product. We offer Cross Linked Foam in variety of Colour and wide range of rolls, planks, and fabricated products to suit Customers specific Requirements.
types: Foam Types From Sealing Die Gaskets

products.name: EPDM Foam
products.description: EPDM Foam, made from ethylene propylene diene monomer rubber, is renowned for its exceptional durability and versatility. It offers excellent resistance to weathering, ozone, UV radiation, and extreme temperatures, making it ideal for outdoor and industrial applications.
applications: Cushioning in automotive, construction, and manufacturing sectors

products.name: XLPE Foam
products.description: XLPE (Cross-Linked Polyethylene) foam is a high-performance material known for its excellent cushioning, insulation, and impact resistance properties. Created through a cross-linking process that enhances its structural integrity, XLPE foam offers superior durability, thermal insulation, and resistance to moisture, chemicals, and UV radiation.

products.name: NITRIL Foam
products.description: Nitrile foam, composed of nitrile rubber and known for its high resilience and durability, is widely used for its exceptional oil and chemical resistance, as well as its excellent cushioning and insulation properties. This closed-cell foam material is highly effective at dampening vibrations, providing thermal insulation, and creating a reliable barrier against water, air, and noise.

products.name: Stretch Film
products.description: Stretch Film is wrapped around items and Pallets. It's an Affordable way to protect your Pallets load as well as keep items clean during transport. Stretch wrap Film is offered as hand Stretch Film and Machine Stretch Film Rolls.

specifications.guarantee: All dimensions (Thickness, Width and Length) are guaranteed

applications: Packing of Loose and Small Products Together

products.name: BOPP Tapes
products.description: BOPP Tapes are Biaxially Oriented Polypropylene tapes used for sealing cartons without distortion of products inside cartons. These tapes are environment friendly and keep cartons bound together for longer time without causing any damage due to impact of outer environment.

products.name: Export Packaging Items
products.description: Export Packaging Items are essential for ensuring that goods are safely transported and protected during international shipping. These packaging solutions are designed to withstand the rigors of long-distance transit, handling, and varying environmental conditions.

products.name: Industrial Chemicals
products.description: Industrial chemicals play a critical role in the global manufacturing and processing sectors, serving as essential inputs for a wide range of applications. These chemicals, encompassing acids, alkalis, solvents, and specialty compounds, are pivotal in industries such as pharmaceuticals, agriculture, textiles, and construction.

specifications.qualityControl: Stringent quality control and adherence to safety and environmental regulations
specifications.rAndD: Heavy investment in research and development for innovation, performance improvement, sustainability, and safety
